Terraform

Validated patterns for Terraform

12 tutorials
  •  
    11min
    Migrate CloudFormation templates to Terraform configurations
    Learn migration patterns and best practices to move from AWS CloudFormation templates to Terraform configurations.
    • Terraform
  •  
    17min
    Migrate Terraform Enterprise organizations to projects
    Migrate from Terraform Enterprise multi-organization setups to single organization using projects architecture.
    • Terraform
  •  
    15min
    Integrate Terraform with Cortex Cloud by Palo Alto Networks
    Integrate Terraform with Palo Alto Networks Cortex Cloud for enhanced security scanning and compliance in your infrastructure pipelines.
    • Terraform
  •  
    26min
    Manage Terraform provider upgrades
    Learn best practices and follow step-by-step workflows for upgrading Terraform provider versions while minimizing infrastructure disruption.
    • Terraform
  •  
    14min
    Integrate Terraform with Vault
    Integrate Terraform with Vault to enhance infrastructure security through automated secrets management and dynamic credentials.
    • Terraform
    • Vault
  •  
    22min
    Vulnerability and patch management of infrastructure images with HCP
    Use HCP Packer and Terraform together to implement comprehensive vulnerability and patch management for your infrastructure.
    • Terraform
    • Packer
  •  
    23min
    Upgrade and refactor Terraform modules
    Learn best practices and systematic approaches for upgrading and refactoring Terraform modules to improve maintainability and functionality.
    • Terraform
  •  
    16min
    Automate deployments with HCP Terraform and ServiceNow Catalog
    Automate infrastructure deployments by integrating HCP Terraform with ServiceNow Service Catalog for streamlined IT service delivery.
    • Terraform
  •  
    37min
    Use Terraform to build an Azure landing zone
    Learn comprehensive strategies for designing, deploying, and managing secure Azure landing zones using Terraform infrastructure as code practices.
    • Terraform
  •  
    40min
    Use Terraform to build an AWS landing zone
    Learn comprehensive strategies for designing, deploying, and managing secure AWS landing zones using Terraform infrastructure as code practices.
    • Terraform
  •  
    30min
    HCP Terraform Vault-backed dynamic credentials for the AWS provider
    Implement Vault-backed dynamic credentials in Terraform to enhance AWS infrastructure security and reduce credential sprawl.
    • Terraform
    • Vault
  •  
    20min
    Integrate Terraform with Ansible Automation Platform
    Integrate HCP Terraform with Red Hat Ansible Automation Platform for comprehensive enterprise infrastructure automation and orchestration.
    • Terraform
